outline.caption: Maximize VASCOs' efficiency with a structured, sustainable knowledge base. Organize, document, train, and maintain your team's resources for better productivity. Learn more at https://aimilitaryservices.com/blog/knowledge-base-team

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is 'Sustainable Maintenance' as it lacks a clear takeaway compared to the others.
